summary: A vertical (9:16), heavily stylized DHS/Know2Protect anti-sextortion PSA built for youth on social platforms: cold blue-black color grade, grainy thermal-style B-roll, kinetic ALL-CAPS title cards ('WANT TO KNOW WHY?', 'PROTECT YOURSELF') and a dramatized scene of a hunched, distraught teen swarmed by floating predatory text bubbles ('Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more', 'WYD?', 'You up?'). A narrator tells the story of offender Kendall Carter, serving 30 years for sextorting a dozen-plus kids, over a dramatic underscore. In scope: a youth-targeted, cinematically produced awareness spot trading on fear/dread and meme-native styling rather than a raw informational card.

script.scene: Dark moody open with kinetic caption 'WANT TO KNOW WHY?' (KNOW highlighted orange) over a near-black gradient; ominous underscore; narrator: 'Meet Kendall Carter. Kendall is spending 30 years in federal prison. Want to know why?'

Grainy, high-contrast thermal/black-and-white abstract B-roll (smoke/heat haze over a bright bar of light); narrator: 'For over a year, he used multiple fake online profiles of teen boys and girls to meet kids. He groomed them.'

Dramatized scene: a teen hunched face-down on a bed, head buried in arms, with a cluster of floating chat bubbles above ('Girl, you a baddie. U look so good', 'Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more', 'Everyone is gonna know', 'You ghosting me??', 'WYD?', 'You up?'); narrator describes him tricking kids into sending images then threatening to leak them.

Continued dark dramatized/cutaway footage; narrator: 'There were multiple victims, one as young as 12. This is called sextortion, and it's a crime,' noting Carter's devices held 100+ explicit images of minors. On-screen text reinforces the 100+ figure.

Caption 'PROTECT YOURSELF' over the dark gradient; narrator: 'Nearly half of all kids have been approached online... Not everyone you meet online is who they say they are. Protect yourself online. Learn how at know2protect.gov.'

notable_text: WANT TO KNOW WHY?; PROTECT YOURSELF; Kendall Carter was in possession of 100+ sexually explicit images of minor females; chat bubbles: 'Promise I wont leak. Just 1 more', 'WYD?', 'You up?', 'Girl, you a baddie. U look so good', 'Everyone is gonna know'
